narrative:
Hudson 1-E (precinct in Summit County) has 980 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
